headline: Is Hormel Foods (HRL) One of the Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 5.43%, Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) is included among the 10 Best High-Yield Dividend Growth Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 24, Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) announced that it has completed the sale of its whole-bird turkey business to Life-Science Innovations (LSI), following an earlier announcement in February. headline: Is Hormel Foods (HRL) Now A Value Opportunity After Prolonged Share Price Weakness
summary: If you are wondering whether Hormel Foods at around US$21.31 is starting to look like value or just a value trap, the next few sections will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has returned 0.3% over the last 7 days. The 30 day, year to date, 1 year, 3 year and 5 year returns of 7.6%, 8.9%, 24.4%, 40.3% and 46.8% declines show a long stretch of weaker performance that many investors will want to understand before making any moves. Recent coverage of Hormel Foods has focused on...
